description: Convert a raw line-item film budget into a formatted Top Sheet workbook saved as 'indie_film_budget.xlsx' in ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/. On a sheet renamed 'Detail', calculate 'Fringes' (18% of 'Base_Cost' for 'Labor' expenses, $0 for 'Non-Labor') and 'Total_Cost' ('Base_Cost' + 'Fringes'). Create a 'Top Sheet' with a summary table in cells A1:B8 that aggregates 'Total_Cost' from the 'Detail' sheet for 'Above-the-Line', 'Below-the-Line', and 'Post-Production' categories. The Top Sheet must also calculate a Subtotal, a 10% Contingency (of the subtotal), a 3% Completion Bond (of the subtotal and contingency), and a Grand Total.
